game.name: Sokoban
game.history: The Sokoban puzzle was originally conceived by Hiroyuki Imabayashi, founder of Thinking Rabbit, a video game developer. It was released commercially in 1982.

board.pieces: There are an equal number of crates and targets, which can be moved by the worker.
board.tomove: Click an arrow to move the crate to one of its empty, adjacent tiles.
board.rules: The puzzle is solved when each crate is located on a target.

gamescrafters.gamescrafter: Doris Chiang (Backend, GamesmanUni GUI Design & Implementation)
Kshitij Tomar (Backend, GamesmanUni GUI Implementation, Variants)
